title: SQL: cast interval to time results in zero time
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, duration INT NOT NULL);
SELECT duration, SEC_TO_TIME(duration) AS time_value FROM test_intervals;
SELECT id, SEC_TO_TIME(duration) AS time_value FROM test_intervals WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, SEC_TO_TIME(120) AS time_value FROM test_intervals;
key_bug_features: casting interval to time returns zero time
